overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded protagonist in white robes exploring a sunlit historic Islamic garden with stone pathways, flowering bushes, and palm trees. The character walks past an NPC in red robes and enters a vine-covered pergola with intricate lattice shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic Islamic garden courtyard with flower beds

events.description: NPC in red robes walks past the protagonist from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone garden path alongside flowering bushes

notable_agents.action: walking past the protagonist wearing red robes and carrying a sword

entered.detail: dense beds of blue flowers lining the right side of the path
tall palm trees rising above the garden walls
tan stone walls enclosing the garden
vine-covered pergola entrance visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through a sunlit historic garden with blue flower beds on the right and stone walls on the left. An NPC in red robes passes by on the left side, walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden approach to covered walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the pergola entrance, passing large terracotta planters

entered.detail: large reddish-brown ceramic pots with dried plants
stone staircase leading up to a higher terrace

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the open garden toward the pergola entrance, passing terracotta planters and a stone staircase on the left. The flower beds fall behind as the covered walkway approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered vine pergola with lattice shadow patterns

events.description: entering the covered pergola from the open garden, light becomes dappled

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola corridor toward the distant archway

entered.detail: wooden lattice roof covered in dense green vines casting shadow patterns
decorative wooden lattice screens on the sides
cascading blue flowers hanging from the pergola structure
arched stone doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered pergola where sunlight filters through vine-covered lattice, creating dappled shadows on the stone path. Blue flowers hang from the right side as the protagonist approaches the distant arched exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, open historic garden that gradually transitions into a shaded, vine-covered pergola. It begins with the protagonist walking past vibrant blue flower beds and stone walls, momentarily crossing paths with an NPC in red robes. As the character proceeds forward, the open garden expands to reveal terracotta planters and a stone staircase on the left before the flower beds recede. The scene then shifts as the protagonist enters the covered walkway, where the bright sunlight transforms into dappled shadows filtering through a lattice of vines. Finally, the camera follows the character along the stone path under hanging blue flowers toward a distant arched exit.
